blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,561 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
